title: Giftun Island Snorkeling
description: Crystal-clear waters and vibrant coral reefs await you at Giftun Island. Swim alongside tropical fish in one of the Red Sea's most iconic spots.

title: Desert Safari by Quad Bike
description: Race across golden dunes on a powerful quad bike, visit a Bedouin village, and enjoy a stunning desert sunset with traditional tea.

title: Dolphin House Reef Trip
description: Encounter playful dolphins in their natural habitat at Dolphin House. Includes snorkeling stops at pristine reef locations.

title: Glass Bottom Boat Tour
description: See the wonders of the Red Sea without getting wet! Our glass bottom boat reveals a mesmerizing underwater world of corals and marine life.

title: Parasailing Adventure
description: Soar high above the turquoise waters of Hurghada for breathtaking panoramic views of the coastline and the Red Sea.

title: Luxor Day Trip
description: Explore the ancient wonders of Luxor including the Valley of the Kings, Karnak Temple, and the Colossi of Memnon on a guided day trip.
